title: Skin is the New Canvas
shortDescription: Body as canvas — collaborative series with Claudia Sahuquillo, photographed by Giuseppe Fioretti.
longStory: Claudia Sahuquillo is a Barcelona-based artist who works on the human body as canvas. Giuseppe Fioretti photographed the series Skin is the New Canvas — celebrating form, colour and presence through painting and photography.

title: Tutti in Uno
shortDescription: Mixed media body painting from the Skin is the New Canvas series.
longStory: Part of Skin is the New Canvas — body painting by Claudia Sahuquillo, photographed by Giuseppe Fioretti. Form, colour and composition on skin as living canvas.

title: Pee Pee
shortDescription: Body painting study from the Skin is the New Canvas series.
longStory: Part of Skin is the New Canvas — body painting by Claudia Sahuquillo, photographed by Giuseppe Fioretti.

title: Eyes
shortDescription: Painting exploring gaze, perception and the human figure.
longStory: From the Skin is the New Canvas body of work — a painting piece created with Claudia Sahuquillo, available as an original or limited print.

title: Artwork · Blue Study
shortDescription: Ink and colour study from the Skin is the New Canvas series.
longStory: A visual exploration from Skin is the New Canvas — bold line, colour and the human form. Created with Claudia Sahuquillo.

title: Drawing
shortDescription: Ink on paper — grid study from the Skin is the New Canvas series.
longStory: Ink on paper from Skin is the New Canvas — a drawing study exploring texture, repetition and the body as material.

title: Artwork · Visual Study
shortDescription: Painting from the Skin is the New Canvas series.
longStory: Selected artwork from Skin is the New Canvas — created with Claudia Sahuquillo.
